name: lex-academy
description: 18-module interactive frontend engineering course delivered as a VS Code extension

scripts.build: cd .lesson-runner && node export-prompts.js && node -e "require('fs').copyFileSync('course-data.json', '../extension/media/course-data.json')" && cd ../extension && pnpm build
scripts.test: cd .lesson-runner && pnpm test && cd ../extension && pnpm test
scripts.package: pnpm build && cd extension && npx @vscode/vsce package --no-dependencies
